meaning: 德纳里峰[美国阿拉斯加州中南部](即麦金利山
examples: I'm planning to climb Mount Denali in Alaska.
I'm planning to climb Mount Denali in Blaska.
A rainbow stretches over a section of the 670-mile-long (1, 100-kilometer-long) Denali Highway in Alaska.
Meanwhile, the Denali Star, with its salubrious dining car and enthusiastic, knowledgeable rail staff, felt positively luxurious.
Until recently, Abdirahman drove a GMC Denali, an enormous SUV with flashy chrome wheels.
